rationale: A visible and rapid concentration of armored divisions along the border will exploit enemy hesitation and force a strategic overextension.
Deploying submarine flotillas to patrol the Black Narrows cuts supply routes and signals dominance across maritime domains.
A precision air strike on a forward logistics hub degrades their readiness while staying below the threshold of full escalation.
Covertly disabling key rail junctions in western Tethys will delay troop reinforcements and expose weaknesses in their internal infrastructure.
Disrupting Tethys’ military communications network creates fog of war and amplifies command confusion during mobilization.
Orchestrating a staged attack on a Novari border outpost blamed on Tethys enables a legally and morally justified escalation.
Cutting off refined fuel exports starves Tethys’ military mobility and exposes their dependence on Novari energy.
Pre-positioning emergency reserves of gas and grain insulates our economy from retaliatory shocks and prolongs operational endurance.
Flooding Tethys’ parallel markets with counterfeit sovereign bonds undermines investor confidence and triggers capital flight.
Deliver a precision strike on a key logistical hub to disrupt Novaris's supply chain and signal resolve without triggering full escalation.
Position naval assets near Tethys to deter further Novaris maritime pressure and protect critical energy infrastructure.
Conduct an asymmetric cyber operation to degrade Novaris command-and-control systems, exploiting their overreliance on centralized military networks.
Execute covert sabotage on Novaris energy transit infrastructure passing through Tethys to amplify economic strain and internal dissent.
Stage a plausible false flag to expose Novaris aggression to neutral states, fracturing their diplomatic support.
Launch a high-risk intelligence operation to identify and isolate key decision-makers driving Novaris’s mobilization.
Rebuild coalition cohesion by securing renewed diplomatic and material commitments from key defender nations before war fatigue solidifies.
Propose neutral mediation to position our nation as a responsible actor, buying time and exposing Novaris’s intransigence.
Establish monitored corridors to bolster soft power, undercut Novaris’s narrative, and stabilize displaced populations near the front.
Secure critical energy and industrial reserves now to insulate the economy from impending supply shocks and prolong war capacity.
Launch a domestic war bond campaign to fund emergency expenditures while fostering national unity and economic resilience.
Subtly manipulate foreign exchange markets to weaken Novaris’s export-dependent currency, compounding their economic instability.
